title: dryopteris × slossoniae
intro: Dryopteris × slossoniae, also known as Slosson's wood fern, is a rare and endangered hybrid species of fern native to North America, resulting from the cross between Dryopteris intermedia and Dryopteris crenata. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiseptic and anti-bacterial agent. Dryopteris × slossoniae can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, teas, and tinctures, although its availability and usage are often limited due to its rare nature and protected status.
